task: The robot picked up the ball. It was heavy.
Sarah handed the report to Michael. She had finished editing it the previous evening.
The dog chased the squirrel up the tree. It barked loudly from below.
Maria gave the painting to Elena. She had finished it just last week.
The chef placed the cake on the counter. It was decorated with fresh strawberries.
Tom met James at the cafe. He had been waiting for almost an hour already.
The teacher gave the student a book. She thought he would enjoy reading it.
The bird landed on the branch. It snapped under the unexpected weight.
Lisa called Karen yesterday morning. She wanted to invite her to dinner.
